nodes.name: sciona.mint.rotary_embedding
nodes.conceptual_summary: Grouped atoms sharing an upstream family or module.
nodes.critic_notes: pubrev-019 split the generated duplicate rotaryembedding definitions into explicit numpy and torch public atoms matching registry names.
nodes.decomposition_rationale: Replaces singleton atom subpackages with a flat module layout.

nodes.name: rotaryembedding_numpy
nodes.description: Apply MINT/RoFormer rotary positional embedding to NumPy query/key arrays.

inputs.name: q
inputs.constraints: required array with even head dimension

inputs.name: k
inputs.constraints: required array with even head dimension matching q

outputs.name: result
outputs.constraints: rotated query/key arrays preserving input shapes

nodes.conceptual_summary: Computes MINT's rotate-half rotary embedding with cached-table-equivalent sinusoidal factors.
nodes.critic_notes: NumPy replay helper for the upstream torch RotaryEmbedding semantics; no trainable state is introduced.

nodes.name: rotaryembedding_torch
nodes.description: Apply MINT/RoFormer rotary positional embedding to torch query/key tensors.

inputs.name: q
inputs.constraints: required tensor with even head dimension

inputs.name: k
inputs.constraints: required tensor with even head dimension matching q

outputs.name: result
outputs.constraints: rotated query/key tensors preserving input shapes

nodes.conceptual_summary: Computes MINT's rotate-half rotary embedding for torch tensors.
nodes.critic_notes: pubrev-019 remediated prior interleaved-pair rotation and duplicate-def FQDN drift to match upstream MINT rotary_embedding.py.
